Bash(awk '/FUNCTION public.admin_update_request/{f=1} f{print NR": "$0} /\\$\\$;/{if\(f && seen\)exit} /\\$\\$/{if\(f\)seen=1}' supabase-pricing-audit-fields.sql)
Bash(awk 'BEGIN{f=0;d=0} /CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION public.admin_update_request/{f=1} f{print} f&&/\\$\\$/{d++; if\(d==2\) exit}' supabase-pricing-audit-fields.sql)

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const c=fs.readFileSync\('C:/Users/Mark/Documents/New Business/admin.js','utf8'\); let d=0; for\(const ch of c\){if\(ch==='{'\)d++;else if\(ch==='}'\)d--;} console.log\('balance:',d,'\(0=ok\)'\);")

PowerShell($c = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\Mark\\Documents\\New Business\\admin.js" -Raw; $open = \($c.ToCharArray\(\) | Where-Object { $_ -eq '{' }\).Count; $close = \($c.ToCharArray\(\) | Where-Object { $_ -eq '}' }\).Count; "Open: $open  Close: $close  Balance: $\($open - $close\)")
